INVITE sip:34020000001320000001@192.168.1.20:5061 SIP/2.0
Via: SIP/2.0/UDP 192.168.1.10:5060;branch=z9hG4bKbroadcast1
From: <sip:server@192.168.1.10:5060>;tag=tag-local
To: <sip:34020000001320000001@192.168.1.20:5060>
Call-ID: call-broadcast-1
CSeq: 1 INVITE
Content-Type: application/sdp
Content-Length: 0

v=0
o=server 0 0 IN IP4 192.168.1.10
s=Talk
c=IN IP4 192.168.1.10
t=0 0
m=audio 7000 TCP/RTP/AVP 8
a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000
a=sendrecv
